annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Configuration: load/save/reset, get/set by key, and Zone Selector-specific settings.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reload settings from disk.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Save current settings to disk.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reset all settings to their defaults.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all settings as a JSON object.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: All settings as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get a single setting value by key (variant type).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Setting key name.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Setting value (variant).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch-get multiple settings in one call. Unknown keys are omitted from the result map.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of setting key names to fetch.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of key → value for every key that was found.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a single setting by key. Returns true if updated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Setting key name.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New value (variant).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if setting was updated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch-set multiple settings in one call. Applies every key via the setter registry and saves once. Unknown keys are logged but do not abort the batch.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of setting key to value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if every key was found and its setter succeeded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the list of all setting key names.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: All setting key names.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when any setting is modified.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon to KWin effect: the per-event motion-profile tree changed (a profiles/<path>.json override was edited and rescanned). Kept separate from settingsChanged so the Settings app's value-change detection is not reset by its own profile-file writes; the KWin effect re-fetches motionProfileTree on this signal.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns true if the Zone Selector feature is enabled.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if Zone Selector is enabled.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Enable or disable the Zone Selector.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to enable.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the trigger distance (pixels) for showing Zone Selector.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Trigger distance in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set the Zone Selector trigger distance.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Trigger distance in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the Zone Selector position (e.g. edge/side).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Position enum value (e.g. edge/side).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set the Zone Selector position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Position enum value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when Zone Selector enabled state changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New enabled state.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when trigger distance changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New trigger distance in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when Zone Selector position changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New position enum value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get metadata for a single setting key. Returns JSON with key and type fields.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Setting key name.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {key, type}. Type is bool, int, double, string, color, or stringlist.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get metadata for all settings. Returns JSON object mapping keys to type info.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object: {key: {type}, ...}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get list of available shader effects with metadata.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of shader metadata maps.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get detailed information about a specific shader.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader metadata map (empty if not found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get default parameter values for a shader.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of parameter IDs to default values.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Translate shader params from param IDs to uniform names for ZoneShaderItem.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of param IDs to values (e.g. intensity: 0.5).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of uniform names to values (e.g. customParams1_x: 0.5).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Check if shader effects are enabled (compiled with shader support).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if shaders are available.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Check if user-installed shaders are supported.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if user shaders can be loaded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get path to the user shader installation directory.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Path to ~/.local/share/plasmazones/shaders.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Open the user shader directory in the file manager.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reload all shaders from disk.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get all per-screen settings for a screen and category.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual or physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: 'autotile' | 'snapping' | 'zoneSelector'.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of per-screen setting key to value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a single per-screen setting and schedule a debounced save.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual or physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: 'autotile' | 'snapping' | 'zoneSelector'.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Per-screen setting key name.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New value (variant).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear all per-screen overrides for a screen and category, reverting to global defaults.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual or physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: 'autotile' | 'snapping' | 'zoneSelector'.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch-set multiple per-screen keys in one D-Bus call. Applies every entry to the named category and schedules a single debounced save.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual or physical screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: 'autotile' | 'snapping' | 'zoneSelector'.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of per-screen setting key -> value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the category was recognized and the batch ran against a concrete Settings backend; false if the category was unknown or no concrete backend was available. Individual per-key failures are logged by the underlying Settings implementation but cannot be surfaced here since the setter methods return void.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Asynchronously request the running-windows list. The daemon emits runningWindowsRequested to the KWin effect; the reply is delivered via the runningWindowsAvailable signal.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: KWin effect to daemon callback: deliver the enumerated running-windows list in response to requestRunningWindows. The daemon re-broadcasts it via runningWindowsAvailable.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array: [{windowClass, appName, caption}, ...].

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon to KWin effect: please enumerate running windows. Emitted by requestRunningWindows; the effect answers via provideRunningWindows.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a fresh running-windows list has arrived from the KWin effect.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array: [{windowClass, appName, caption}, ...].
